generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people support alliances, but have we really thought about the trade-offs? Our country is carrying too much of the burden while others free-ride. We're spending billions on defense that could go to healthcare or education. And let's be honest - these alliances don't always keep us safer. Remember when [Alliance Partner] hesitated during that crisis? We need to put America first and demand our partners step up or pay their fair share. #StrongerAtHome #FairBurdenSharing
